message:
feat: Add curl-style installer script

New install experience with progress display and options:

  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ruvnet/claude-flow/main/scripts/install.sh | bash

Features:
- Colored output with progress indicators
- Requirements checking (Node 20+)
- Install time measurement
- Quick start guide after install
- Environment variable options:
  - CLAUDE_FLOW_GLOBAL=1 (global npm install)
  - CLAUDE_FLOW_MINIMAL=1 (skip optional deps)
  - CLAUDE_FLOW_VERSION=x.x.x (specific version)

See issue #1026 for full ADR on install improvements.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
